TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bob_Brannum, title = Bob_Brannum, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Brannum} }

S.FORM: == Bob Brannum == Bob Brannum sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 5, Bob Brannum, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2005) kawas tay 1955, Bob Brannum mhngaw ru ini pcizyaw la. babaw nya lga maki ta Norwich, Kenyon ru krahu na pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. wal maqux 204 pinspung. ru mnwah beh Koka na Brandeis musa mraw pcbaq mzuy mari tara uzi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Bob Brannum == Bob Brannum sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 5, Bob Brannum, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2005) kawas tay 1955, Bob Brannum mhngaw ru ini pcizyaw la. babaw nya lga maki ta Norwich, Kenyon ru krahu na pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. wal maqux 204 pinspung. ru mnwah beh Koka na Brandeis musa mraw pcbaq mzuy mari tara uzi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == βoβ βrannum == βoβ βrannum s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ βrannum, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) kawas~ɕ taj ****, βoβ βrannum mħŋaw ru ini pʦ~ʨizjaw la. βaβaw nja lɣa maki ta norwiʦ~ʨħ, kenjon ru kraħu na pqwas~ɕan βiru rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. wal maqux *** pins~ɕpuŋ. ru mnwaħ βeħ koka na βran*eis~ɕ mus~ɕa mraw pʦ~ʨβaq mzuj mari tara uzi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
